Prism Labs

LOCATION

San Francisco, CA

TYPE

Full-time

COMPENSATION

$165,000 - $215,000 USD

TECH STACK

Swift

SwiftUI

UIKit

Xcode

Combine

Core Data

XCTest

Instruments

App Store Connect

GitHub

Senior iOS Engineer

About Prism Labs: Prism Labs is a mobile-first technology
company focused on building adaptive iOS applications that
leverage machine learning and real-time data processing.
Founded in 2019, we serve over 2 million users across health,
productivity, and lifestyle categories. Our engineering teams are

distributed across San Francisco, Austin, and Toronto, and we're
committed to shipping high-quality, performant iOS apps that
delight users.

We're seeking an experienced Senior iOS Engineer to lead the
development of our flagship health and wellness app. You'll

architect complex features, mentor junior developers, and
collaborate closely with product and design teams to deliver
exceptional user experiences. This is an excellent opportunity to
own significant portions of our codebase while influencing the
technical direction of our iOS platform.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Design and implement sophisticated iOS features using Swift
and SwiftUI, ensuring optimal performance and user
experience across multiple device sizes and iOS versions

Lead technical architecture decisions for new features and
systems, establishing best practices and design patterns that
junior engineers follow

Conduct thorough code reviews, mentoring junior and mid-
level iOS engineers on Swift idioms, architecture patterns, and
performance optimization techniques

Manage complex data synchronization and offline-first

capabilities using Core Data and custom networking layers,
ensuring data consistency and integrity

Optimize app performance using Xcode Instruments,
addressing memory leaks, battery drain, and startup time
issues to maintain < 50MB memory footprint

Collaborate with backend engineers to design efficient APIs
and implement Combine-based reactive data flows for real-
time updates

Contribute to App Store submission processes, manage app
versioning, and coordinate release cycles with 90+ day support
windows

Intelligent mobile experiences thatadapt to you Participate in technical hiring and onboarding of iOS engineers,
conducting interviews and contributing to team growth
initiatives

REQUIREMENTS

5-8 years of professional iOS development experience with a
portfolio of shipped applications on the App Store

Expert-level proficiency in Swift and deep understanding of
object-oriented and functional programming paradigms

Proven experience architecting large-scale iOS applications
with complex state management using Combine and reactive
frameworks

Strong knowledge of UIKit and SwiftUI, including experience
migrating legacy UIKit code to SwiftUI

Demonstrated expertise with Core Data for complex data

modeling, migrations, and performance optimization

Experience with Xcode debugging tools, profiling with
Instruments, and optimizing for various iOS devices and
network conditions

BONUS POINTS

Experience with CI/CD pipelines and automated testing
frameworks (XCTest, Snapshot Testing)

Familiarity with accessibility standards (WCAG) and VoiceOver
implementation

Open source contributions to iOS libraries or frameworks

Experience with GraphQL or REST API integration patterns in
production environments

BENEFITS

Competitive health, dental, and vision insurance (100%
employer-paid for employee)

401(k) matching up to 6% with immediate vesting

Flexible work-from-home policy (2-3 days in office per week)

Professional development budget ($3,000 annually for
conferences, courses, training)

Paid time off: 20 days vacation + 10 sick days + 5 company
holidays

Stock options package with 4-year vesting schedule

Quarterly team offsites and engineering retreats

Mental health support and wellness programs (gym stipend,
meditation app)

 APPLY

Apply directly through our careers page at prism-labs.io/careers
or send your resume, GitHub profile link, and a brief cover letter
describing your most impactful iOS project to careers@prism-
labs.io. We review applications on a rolling basis.
